title: phlomoides umbrosa
intro: Phlomoides umbrosa, also known as the Chinese lavender or Chinese mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to soothe coughs, relieve respiratory issues, and promote digestion. The health benefits of Phlomoides umbrosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides umbrosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
